name: ◈ Security Vulnerability
about: PLEASE READ: How to report a security issue
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security

---

### ⚠ STOP: DO NOT OPEN A PUBLIC ISSUE FOR SECURITY BUGS

To keep our users safe, please do not report security vulnerabilities here on GitHub.

If you have found a security bug in Vault CLI, please follow our [Security Policy](https://github.com/LutfiGarzon/vault/blob/main/.github/SECURITY.md) and email us privately at:

**lgarzon@infeenix.com**

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and work with you to resolve the issue before a public disclosure is made.

Thank you for your help in keeping the Vault community secure!
